scripts.format: npm run format:json && npm run format:md
scripts.remove-local-modules: node ./common/dist/toolkit.js clean cog/node_modules common/node_modules components/node_modules dali/node_modules data/node_modules eventful/node_modules machine/node_modules money/node_modules observable/node_modules part/node_modules tmpdir/node_modules
scripts.all: npm -w app-builder run all && npm -w cog run all && npm -w components run all && npm -w dali run all && npm -w data-binding run all && npm -w eventful run all && npm -w machine run all && npm -w money run all && npm -w observable run all && npm -w part run all && npm -w tmpdir run all
